title: Proposed Statement of Strategic Priorities for telecommunications, the management of radio spectrum, and postal services
body: "This consultation is seeking views on the government’s strategic priorities and desired outcomes for fixed and mobile digital infrastructure, the management of radio spectrum, telecoms consumers, telecoms security and resilience, and postal services.  These are set out in the proposed Statement of Strategic Priorities for telecommunications, the management of radio spectrum, and postal services.  We welcome responses from interested individuals and organisations from across the UK.  We recommend that you read the full consultation document before completing your response. Following this consultation, we will carefully consider views and evidence, which will inform our response.  Read our consultation privacy notice.  "
